description: You are an Engineering Manager preparing a quarterly business review (QBR) dashboard for the VP of Infrastructure. Create a dashboard named exactly 'QBR Infrastructure Summary' containing three specific graphs that transform raw metrics into readable formats. The first graph, titled 'Top CPU Consumers', must display the top 2 instances by current CPU utilization using the target `aliasByNode(highestCurrent(servers.ec2_instance_*.cpu.*, 2), 1)`. The second graph, titled 'Disk Write Rate', must show per-second rates for instance 1 and instance 2 disk write bytes using `nonNegativeDerivative()` with the aliases "Instance 1 Writes/sec" and "Instance 2 Writes/sec". The third graph, titled 'Fleet CPU Envelope', must show the statistical boundaries of the fleet's CPU utilization (`servers.ec2_instance_*.cpu.*`) using `maxSeries`, `averageSeries`, and `minSeries` with the aliases "Fleet Maximum", "Fleet Average", and "Fleet Minimum" respectively. Save the dashboard when complete, ensuring exact spelling and case for all titles, aliases, and Graphite functions.
